title: ribes lacustre var. horridum
intro: Ribes lacustre var. horridum, also known as the mountain currant, is a deciduous shrub native to the mountainous regions of North America. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Ribes lacustre var. horridum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat colds, fever, and other infections.
